hero.heading: Gapflow and Slack
hero.subheading: Explore the world of endless possibilities with purpose-built automation

documentation.title: Getting Started with Slack
documentation.description: Connect your Slack workspace and learn how to build your first automated notification workflow.

documentation.title: Interactive Messages & Workflows
documentation.description: Create engaging interactive messages with buttons, dropdowns, and forms to build powerful workflow automations.

documentation.title: Slack Bot Best Practices
documentation.description: Learn best practices for building Slack bots that your team will love, including proper formatting and timing.

tutorials.title: Build Your First Slack Bot
tutorials.description: Create a smart notification bot that monitors your systems and automatically alerts your team in Slack with rich, formatted messages and actionable buttons.

tutorials.title: Automated Incident Management
tutorials.description: Set up a complete incident response system that creates dedicated channels, notifies the right teams, and tracks resolution all through Slack.

tutorials.title: Interactive Approval Workflows
tutorials.description: Build approval workflows with interactive buttons that let team members approve or reject requests directly from Slack messages.

faqs.question: How do I connect my Slack workspace?
faqs.answer: Click 'Connect to Slack' in the integration settings. You'll be redirected to Slack to authorize Gapflow. Make sure you have admin permissions in your workspace.

faqs.question: Can I send messages to private channels?
faqs.answer: Yes, but the Gapflow bot must be invited to the private channel first. Use /invite @GapflowBot in the channel to add it.

faqs.question: What about rate limits?
faqs.answer: Slack enforces rate limits on API calls. Gapflow automatically handles these with intelligent throttling and retry logic to ensure message delivery.

faqs.question: Can I use interactive components?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Gapflow supports buttons, dropdowns, date pickers, and other interactive components. Build rich, interactive workflows your team can engage with.

faqs.question: How do I format messages?
faqs.answer: Use Slack's Block Kit for rich formatting. Gapflow provides a visual builder for creating beautifully formatted messages with text, images, and interactive elements.

faqs.question: Can I schedule messages?
faqs.answer: Yes! Schedule messages to be sent at specific times. Perfect for reminders, announcements, and recurring updates that need to go out at optimal times.

limits.title: Message Rate Limits
limits.description: Slack enforces rate limits on message posting. For high-volume scenarios, implement batching or use Slack's incoming webhooks for better performance.

limits.title: Message Size Limits
limits.description: Messages are limited to 40,000 characters. Large content should be split across multiple messages or uploaded as files.

limits.title: File Upload Limits
limits.description: Free workspaces have storage limits. Consider file sizes when automating file uploads and implement cleanup strategies for old files.

limits.title: App Permissions
limits.description: Ensure the Gapflow Slack app has appropriate permissions for your workflows. Some features require additional scopes to be granted.
